name: Citizens Financial Group Inc. Depositary Shares Each Representing a 1/40th Interest in a Share of 7.375% Fixed-Rate Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock Series H
summary: Citizens Financial Group Inc. Depositary Shares Each Representing a 1/40th Interest in a Share of 7.375% Fixed-Rate Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock Series H. Citizens Financial Group, headquartered in Providence, Rhode Island, is a retail bank holding company, offering a broad range of retail and commercial banking products and services to individuals, small businesses, middle-market companies, and large corporations. The company provides services such as checking and savings accounts, loans, mortgages, and investment management.
